description: The ScaleTransition component makes a slot scale from one scale state to another, disabling when fully reaching its disabled scale point. The component's scale transition state is controlled via ``ShowField``.

fields.ShowField: Whether to be transitioning to hidden (false) or shown (true)
fields.TransitionTimeField: How long the transition to shown or hidden should take.
fields.ShowScaleField: What scale the object should transition to from ``HiddenScaleField`` when ``ShowField`` is true.
fields.HiddenScaleField: What scale the object should transition to from ``ShowScaleField`` when ``ShowField`` is false.
fields.CurveField: How the object should transition scale over time.
fields._scaleDrive: The field to drive to make this slot scale up and down. Usually the slot's scale field.
fields._enabledDrive: The field to drive to false when the object is done scaling to hidden and drive to true when transitioning away from hidden.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide values to the proper fields. When ``ShowField`` is toggled, the scale and enabled fields of the component will do a little animation.
